sansrusmod.config.title: SansrusMod — Settings
sansrusmod.config.category.main.tooltip: Enable and disable all mod features
sansrusmod.config.disableInvisibility.to: Players with invisibility effect will still be visible
sansrusmod.config.deathWaypoint.tooltip: After death, a clickable message appears in chat to create a waypoint
sansrusmod.config.autoRespawn.tooltip: Player automatically respawns immediately after death
sansrusmod.config.disableRmbCooldown.too: Removes internal RMB cooldown when held for more than 20 ticks
Displays item components in its tooltip
sansrusmod.config.bookPageHold.tooltip: Hold the page flip button — pages will switch automatically
sansrusmod.config.bookScrollSpeed.toolti: 1 — slow (once per 40 ticks), 40 — fast (once per tick)
sansrusmod.config.shiftDragItems.tooltip: Drag mouse over slots with Shift held for quick transfer
sansrusmod.config.copyChatMessage.toolti: Shift + click on message copies its text to clipboard
sansrusmod.config.cyrillicCommands.toolt: Allows typing commands in Cyrillic layout - they will be automatically converted to Latin
sansrusmod.config.deathLog.tooltip: Saves date, time, and full inventory at the moment of player death if inventory had items
sansrusmod.config.tooltipMap.tooltip: Shows the map in tooltip without needing to hold it
sansrusmod.config.chatMessageCounter.too: Combines identical chat messages into one message
sansrusmod.config.armorbarDisplay.toolti: 0 — Off, 1-20 — display time in seconds, 21 — Always
sansrusmod.config.coordParser.tooltip: Parses coordinates from chat and creates Xaero waypoint on click
sansrusmod.config.protectVillage.tooltip: Prevents player from accidentally attacking villagers
sansrusmod.config.elytraFeature.tooltip: Displays elytra on chestplate if it has glider tag
sansrusmod.config.disableNauseaOverlay.t: Disables nausea overlay rendering. USE IF BLACK SCREEN APPEARS WITH NAUSEA EFFECT
sansrusmod.config.ctrlDropAll.tooltip: Hold Ctrl while dropping an item to drop all items of that type from inventory
sansrusmod.message.waypointErrorContaine: Error: container not found for path
sansrusmod.waypoint.death.name: Death point
sansrusmod.deathHistory.title: Death History
